title: Senior Fullstack Engineer in Creators group (React/TypeScript)
cover_letter_draft:
Dear Apify Hiring Team,

I am applying for the Senior Fullstack Engineer role on the Creators group.

Why Apify: I build developer-facing products and automation tooling myself (including a local job-discovery agent), so Apify's Creators ecosystem — helping builders publish, monetize, and scale Actors — feels like the kind of product I would use and want to improve. The DX team's focus on CLI flows, templating, and agentic coding is exactly where my experience with React/TypeScript architecture and AI-assisted development converges.

Over six years, I have led frontend architecture at scale: migrating products to Nx monorepos, designing micro-frontend systems, and shipping React/Next.js/TypeScript applications with measurable impact — including roughly 25% load-time improvements and Lighthouse scores of 100 on key surfaces. I have integrated payment systems and third-party APIs in production, mentored developers, and established testing and code-quality standards across teams.

I would welcome contributing to creator-facing tooling at Apify — especially flows that help builders ship faster with React, TypeScript, and Node.js. I am comfortable working fully remote from Iran, collaborating asynchronously, and going deep on your stack where needed.

Thank you for your consideration. I look forward to discussing how I can help the Creators group.

Best regards,
Mohammad Garmabi

application_answers.why_interested: I use AI-assisted development daily and have built automation tooling myself. Apify's Creators group — helping developers publish and monetize Actors — is the kind of developer-platform work I want to do next. My 6+ years with React/Next.js/TypeScript and API integrations map directly to creator-facing product engineering.
application_answers.salary_expectation: €58,000 – €72,000 gross annual (B2B / contractor equivalent, flexible and open to discussion based on Apify's framework and total package including equity/profit share)
application_answers.office_visits_prague_brno: No — fully remote from Iran; not available for regular office visits.
application_answers.english_level: Professional working proficiency — daily use in remote engineering teams and client collaboration.

notes: Applied 2026-07-05 via apify.com/jobs. Cover letter highlighted Creators/DX fit, AI tooling, React/Next.js architecture, and remote-from-Iran.

title: Senior Full Stack Developer with AI
cover_letter_draft:
Dear Idego Group Hiring Team,

I am applying for the Senior Full Stack Developer with AI role on your maritime operations platform.

Why this project: migrating a legacy monolith into a modern React + Django architecture while shipping AI-powered document extraction is exactly the kind of work I enjoy — high ownership, visible impact, and a stack I use in practice every day on the frontend and in personal fullstack projects.

I bring 6+ years of commercial experience with React and TypeScript, including Next.js, monorepo architecture (Nx), and performance work that cut load times by roughly 25% and achieved Lighthouse scores of 100. I have integrated payment systems and third-party APIs, mentored developers, and led code-quality standards across teams. I use AI tools daily — Cursor, Copilot, and custom automation — both in how I build software and in products I ship.

On the Python/Django side, my professional depth is strongest on the frontend, but I actively build backend systems in Django/DRF (see my open-source projects on GitHub). I am confident contributing to API design, migrations, and AI-powered document pipelines, and I ramp quickly on backend depth where the team needs it.

I work fully remote from Iran, communicate clearly in English with international teams, and would welcome contributing to invoice, fleet, and document-processing modules on a long-term engagement.

Thank you for your consideration.

Best regards,
Mohammad Garmabi

application_answers.salary_expectation: 140 – 170 PLN/h + VAT (B2B), aligned with your posted range (~23,500–28,500 PLN/month)
application_answers.english_level: Professional working proficiency — daily English in remote engineering teams, code reviews, and client-facing collaboration. Comfortable in technical discussions and written async communication.
application_answers.ai_tools_daily: Yes — Cursor, GitHub Copilot, and ChatGPT are part of my daily workflow, including building automation tooling and AI-assisted development.
application_answers.availability_start: Available for start around Q3 2026 as listed; flexible on exact date.

notes: Applied 2026-07-05 via No Fluff Jobs. React/Next/Django/AI fit; honest on Django depth and English level.

Dear Acquisity Hiring Team,

I am applying for the Senior Full-Stack Engineer (Next.js / AI) role.

Your stack and culture match how I already work: Next.js App Router, TypeScript, Postgres, shipping fast with small PRs, and using Cursor daily to build real products — including automation tooling I built myself. I bring 6+ years shipping React/Next.js applications with measurable performance gains, API integrations, and full-stack feature ownership from design through production.

I would welcome owning greenfield agent and dashboard work on your platform — especially LLM-powered flows where product impact is visible within days. I work fully remote from Iran and collaborate clearly in English with distributed teams.

Thank you for your consideration.

Best regards,
Mohammad Garmabi

title: Senior/Staff Frontend Engineer (Remote)
relocate: Visa sponsorship for relocation to NYC within 2+ years
cover_letter_draft:
Dear DualEntry Hiring Team,

I am applying for the Senior/Staff Frontend Engineer role.

DualEntry's mission — building an AI-native ERP from scratch in a market that hasn't seen real innovation in decades — is exactly the kind of high-ownership frontend work I want. I bring 6+ years shipping React and Next.js applications with measurable performance gains, production API integrations (including payment systems), and a pragmatic ship-fast mindset. I care deeply about polished, accessible UI for complex workflows.

I would welcome owning major product surfaces in React + Next.js, helping define your component architecture, and growing with a small team that deploys daily. I am based in Iran today, work fully remote with international teams, maintain consistent overlap with US Eastern hours, and am genuinely interested in DualEntry's visa sponsorship path to NYC in the longer term.

Thank you for your consideration.

Best regards,
Mohammad Garmabi

application_answers.location: Iran (remote); open to future relocation to NYC via visa sponsorship
application_answers.est_overlap: Yes — I can maintain consistent overlap with US Eastern business hours
application_answers.why_dualentry: Rare chance to rebuild ERP with AI from zero at startup speed. I want ownership on React/Next.js UI with a clear long-term path to US relocation.
application_answers.visa_relocate_interest: Yes — interested in visa sponsorship for NYC within 2+ years
application_answers.english_level: C1+ professional — daily use in remote teams, code reviews, async writing

notes: Package approved 2026-07-05. React/Next.js, EST overlap, NYC visa path. Apply when ready. Applied 2026-07-05 via job-applier UI.

cover_letter_draft:
Dear SumUp Hiring Team,

I am applying for the Senior Full-Stack Engineer - SuperApp role in Berlin.

SumUp's mission — empowering millions of small businesses with simple financial tools — aligns with my experience building performant React dashboards and integrating payment systems and third-party APIs in production. I bring 6+ years with React and TypeScript, including Next.js, with measurable impact such as roughly 25% load-time improvements on modular frontends.

I would welcome owning the web side of the SuperApp merchant experience — from first-time user flows to dashboard features — and contributing across the stack with REST APIs and Node.js where needed. I am motivated to relocate to Berlin and join an international, office-first team building products used by millions of merchants worldwide.

Thank you for your consideration.

Best regards,
Mohammad Garmabi

cover_letter_draft:
Dear LionHires / Hiring Team,

I am applying for the Senior Full-Stack (Node/React) Developer role supporting your fintech payments platform partner in Lisbon.

This role aligns closely with my background: 6+ years building production React and Next.js applications with TypeScript, integrating payment systems and third-party APIs, and shipping measurable performance improvements — including roughly 25% load-time gains on modular dashboard products. I have hands-on experience across the stack you describe: Node.js/NestJS backends, GraphQL and REST integrations, Material UI frontends, and engineering practices such as automated testing, clean architecture, and collaborative agile delivery.

I am especially motivated by the opportunity to work on high-load fintech systems where code quality and reliability directly impact millions of transactions. The relocation package and full visa support for Lisbon are a strong fit for my goal to relocate to Europe with my family.

I would welcome discussing how I can contribute to scaling your payments platform and delivering complex provider integrations.

Thank you for your consideration.

Best regards,
Mohammad Garmabi

cover_letter_draft:
Dear FxPro Hiring Team,

I am applying for the Senior Node.js Developer role in Limassol.

FxPro's scale — 600+ people across multiple international offices building fintech infrastructure for payments, banking, and trading — is exactly the kind of high-stakes backend environment where I want to contribute. Over 6+ years I have shipped production TypeScript/JavaScript systems end to end: integrating payment flows and third-party APIs, building performant services with strong testing discipline, and collaborating in agile teams where reliability and low latency matter.

I bring deep experience with Node.js, asynchronous programming, GraphQL/REST integrations, Docker, and microservice-oriented architecture, plus enough frontend context to collaborate effectively with product teams. Financial-services experience through payment integrations, combined with a focus on reusable, testable code and incident-driven improvement, maps well to your payments and banking processing stack.

The relocation bonus and work-permit support for Cyprus align with my goal to relocate to Europe. I would welcome the chance to help FxPro deliver robust, high-availability services at global scale.

Thank you for your consideration.

Best regards,
Mohammad Garmabi

application_answers.english_level: C1+ professional — fluent written and spoken English in distributed teams

cover_letter_draft:
Dear Shiftmove Hiring Team,

I am applying for the Software Engineer - Frontend role on the Avrios product team in Zurich.

Shiftmove's mission — building connected mobility products that turn fleet data into actionable decisions for thousands of B2B customers across Europe — resonates with the kind of product engineering I enjoy: complex operational UIs, measurable user impact, and end-to-end ownership from idea to release. I bring 6+ years shipping production frontend applications in TypeScript, with a strong foundation in performance, clean UI, automated testing, and close collaboration with product and design.

At scale I have delivered modular React dashboards with ~25% load-time improvements, integrated third-party APIs in production, and mentored teams on maintainable architecture. I am comfortable owning features across the lifecycle, evaluating trade-offs, and shipping reliably in fast release cycles — skills that map directly to Avrios's fleet-management and AI-assisted workflow challenges.

I am based in Iran today, work effectively with distributed European teams, and am genuinely interested in relocating to Zurich for your hybrid model with regular in-person collaboration. Visa support where applicable would be essential for my move.

Thank you for your consideration.

Best regards,
Mohammad Garmabi

title: Senior Frontend Engineer - Design System
notes: Found via job-finder (linkedin). Resume match: react, typescript, javascript, frontend, design system. Package prepared 2026-07-07. Applied 2026-07-07 via job-applier UI.
cover_letter_draft:
Dear Synthesia Hiring Team,

I am applying for the Senior Frontend Engineer - Design System role.

Synthesia's design-system challenge — building a shared UI foundation that both engineers and AI agents can use to produce on-brand, accessible interfaces — is one of the most interesting frontend problems in the industry right now. I bring 6+ years shipping React and TypeScript at scale, including design-system work, component architecture in Nx monorepos, and a relentless focus on performance, accessibility, and developer experience.

I have led frontend initiatives with measurable impact: modular React dashboards with ~25% load-time improvements, Lighthouse-driven optimization, and production patterns for testing and documentation that help teams ship consistently. I care deeply about component APIs that stay stable under change, tooling that accelerates product teams, and the kind of machine-readable interfaces (Storybook, tokens, guidelines) that make AI-assisted development actually work in practice.

I am based in Iran today, collaborate daily with international engineering teams in English, and am motivated to relocate to Zurich or another Synthesia hub in Europe where visa support is available. The opportunity to co-own a design system powering products used by Fortune 100 companies is exactly where I want to grow next.

Thank you for your consideration.

Best regards,
Mohammad Garmabi
